case_title: BROWN, MISTY vs. PEARCE, NORMAN IND/DBA PIER 40 ROASTERY & CAFE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, MISTY AS TO DEFENDANT PEARCE, NORMAN IND/DBA PIER 40 ROASTERY & CAFE PIER ROASTERY INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
